title: crocus neglectus
intro: Crocus neglectus, also known as the autumn crocus, is a plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crocus neglectus include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic to relieve urinary issues. Herbal preparations of Crocus neglectus include tinctures, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, but its use should be cautious due to potential toxicity.
